creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Package build fails with:

===>  Building package for python39-3.9.13
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/python39/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.9/__pycache__/_sysconfigdata__freebsd12_.cpython-39.opt-1.pyc:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/python39/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.9/__pycache__/_sysconfigdata__freebsd12_.cpython-39.opt-2.pyc:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/python39/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.9/__pycache__/_sysconfigdata__freebsd12_.cpython-39.pyc:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/python39/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python3.9/_sysconfigdata__freebsd12_.py:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Options are default, build jail is on recent 12-STABLE.
